message:
chore(beads): close Azure implementation bead with audit findings

Mark flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2 (Azure typed client foundation)
as closed/done. Add audit comment documenting the two correctness
issues found and fixed: blob list XML-vs-JSON deserialization mismatch
and insufficiently strict override URL validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1148,7 +1148,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","title":"GCP: readiness, compliance, verification, and operator guidance","description":"Finish GCP with readiness and doctor outputs, project and IAM remediation guidance, deterministic tests across each included GCP service slice, and explicit V3 compliance evidence that proves the connector behaves predictably under auth, quota, and API failure conditions.","acceptance_criteria":"- closeout requires comprehensive deterministic unit coverage for auth, timeout, retry, error-mapping, pagination or state transitions, and the highest-risk provider-specific mutations
- closeout requires archetype-appropriate integration coverage built on shared `fcp-testkit` helpers rather than connector-local one-offs
- closeout requires at least one replayable E2E or host-backed verification script that runs through `rch`, captures detailed structured logs, and preserves manifest, readiness, doctor, and conformance artifacts
- operator guidance must name prerequisites, dedicated environments, redaction rules, common remediation paths, and rerun commands for the verification bundle
- evidence attached to the bead must be sufficient for a future agent to rerun verification without reopening external planning notes","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:28:29.064107Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:19:01.009265Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","title":"[T1-CLOUD.3] fcp.azure — Azure Cloud Connector (VMs, Functions, Storage, Service Bus)","description":"Azure cloud connector for core Microsoft Azure services. Partial coverage exists via Microsoft365 connector but dedicated Azure infra connector needed. Operations: azure.vm.list, azure.vm.start/stop/restart; azure.functions.invoke, azure.functions.list; azure.storage.list_blobs, azure.storage.upload/download_blob; azure.servicebus.send_message, azure.servicebus.receive_messages; azure.resource_groups.list. Auth: Azure AD OAuth2 with service principal (client_id/client_secret/tenant_id). Network: *.azure.com, *.core.windows.net, login.microsoftonline.com. REST APIs throughout. 4 subtasks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:56:56.649857Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:02.797686Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:56:56.649857Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1789,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Testing requirements: 50+ unit tests (wiremock), 10+ integration tests (ConnectorSuite/ComplianceSuite), E2E compliance script, structured JSON logging with connector_id/operation_id/duration_ms, retry telemetry with attempt/delay_ms/error. All tests deterministic, no real API calls, no timing-based flakiness.","created_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","title":"Azure: V3 contract, scope, auth model, and service inventory","description":"Define the V3 contract for Azure. Pin down the exact first-slice service inventory across VMs, Functions, Storage, and Service Bus, the auth boundary around Azure AD and tenant or subscription scoping, OperationInfo safety and risk semantics, and explicit non-goals for the first implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:43:18.044764Z","closed_at":"2026-03-18T06:43:10.382396Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1844,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"V3 contract for Azure:

**Archetype**: Cloud Control Plane (multi-service)
**Auth model**: Service principal (client_id + client_secret + tenant_id) or Managed Identity. Subscription ID required. OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow to login.microsoftonline.com.
**Network**: *.azure.com:443, management.azure.com:443, login.microsoftonline.com:443. TLS required.

**Operations (first slice — VM/Storage/App Service focus)**:
| Operation | SafetyTier | RiskLevel | IdempotencyClass | Capability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| azure.vm.list | Safe | Low | None | azure.compute.read |
| azure.vm.get | Safe | Low | None | azure.compute.read |
| azure.vm.start | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.vm.stop | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.vm.delete | Dangerous | Critical | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.storage.list_containers | Safe | Low | None | azure.storage.read |
| azure.storage.upload_blob | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.storage.write |
| azure.storage.download_blob | Safe | Low | None | azure.storage.read |
| azure.storage.delete_blob | Dangerous | High | Strict | azure.storage.write |
| azure.appservice.list_apps | Safe | Low | None | azure.app.read |
| azure.appservice.deploy | Risky | High | Strict | azure.app.write |
| azure.subscription.get | Safe | Low | None | azure.iam.read |
| azure.health | Safe | Low | Strict | azure.iam.read |

**Safety policy**: VM delete = Dangerous/Critical. Blob delete = Dangerous/High. Deploy = Risky/High. RBAC management deferred. Subscription/resource group scoping explicit in every operation.

**Provisioning**: Service principal creation in Azure AD. Doctor: subscription.get validates auth.

**Non-goals (first slice)**: No RBAC/IAM management, no AKS, no Azure SQL (use database connectors), no Azure DevOps, no Cosmos DB, no Azure Functions management.","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:42:46Z"}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","title":"Azure: typed client foundation, service modules, runtime, and manifest","description":"Build the Azure connector implementation: typed config and auth, per-service client modules, paging and async job handling, ConnectorRuntime lifecycle, truthful manifest declarations, capability scope, network constraints, and typed introspection across the chosen Azure surfaces.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PinkHollow","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-20T01:05:47.413205Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1869,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"PinkHollow claimed Azure implementation slice. Starting with manifest/runtime/client truthfulness audit and first-pass scan of connectors/azure so the next work chunk can land without redoing orientation. Agent Mail remains unavailable in this repo because storage.sqlite3 recovery is blocked by live WAL/SHM sidecars.","created_at":"2026-03-20T00:53:09Z"},{"id":1870,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"COMPLETED by SunnyMoose: Azure connector built. 10 ops (ARM/Blob/KeyVault), 56 tests, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-20T01:05:47Z"}]}
+{"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","title":"Azure: typed client foundation, service modules, runtime, and manifest","description":"Build the Azure connector implementation: typed config and auth, per-service client modules, paging and async job handling, ConnectorRuntime lifecycle, truthful manifest declarations, capability scope, network constraints, and typed introspection across the chosen Azure surfaces.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PinkHollow","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-20T20:16:47Z","closed_at":"2026-03-20T20:16:47Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:03.342547Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1869,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"PinkHollow claimed Azure implementation slice. Starting with manifest/runtime/client truthfulness audit and first-pass scan of connectors/azure so the next work chunk can land without redoing orientation. Agent Mail remains unavailable in this repo because storage.sqlite3 recovery is blocked by live WAL/SHM sidecars.","created_at":"2026-03-20T00:53:09Z"},{"id":1870,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"COMPLETED by SunnyMoose: Azure connector built. 10 ops (ARM/Blob/KeyVault), 56 tests, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-20T01:05:47Z"},{"id":1871,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","author":"jemanuel","text":"Fresh-eyes audit found two real correctness issues in the live Azure code: Blob list operations were still deserializing Azure XML responses as JSON, and override URL validation only checked for a `https://` prefix instead of enforcing Azure hosts/TLS policy. Fixed both, added regression tests, and re-verified with `rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-azure`, `rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-azure --all-targets -- -D warnings`, plus local `rustfmt --check` on the touched files. UBS re-scan only reported test-only unwrap/panic noise.","created_at":"2026-03-20T20:16:47Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","title":"Azure: readiness, compliance, verification, and operator guidance","description":"Finish Azure with readiness and doctor outputs, tenant or permission remediation guidance, deterministic tests across each included Azure service slice, and explicit V3 compliance evidence that proves the connector is operationally understandable and policy-correct.","acceptance_criteria":"- closeout requires comprehensive deterministic unit coverage for auth, timeout, retry, error-mapping, pagination or state transitions, and the highest-risk provider-specific mutations
- closeout requires archetype-appropriate integration coverage built on shared `fcp-testkit` helpers rather than connector-local one-offs
- closeout requires at least one replayable E2E or host-backed verification script that runs through `rch`, captures detailed structured logs, and preserves manifest, readiness, doctor, and conformance artifacts
- operator guidance must name prerequisites, dedicated environments, redaction rules, common remediation paths, and rerun commands for the verification bundle
- evidence attached to the bead must be sufficient for a future agent to rerun verification without reopening external planning notes","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:28:29.086912Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:20:19.390075Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","title":"[T1-CLOUD.4] fcp.cloudflare — Cloudflare Workers, R2, D1, KV, DNS Connector","description":"Cloudflare edge platform connector. Increasingly critical for edge compute, storage, and DNS. Operations: cf.workers.list/deploy/delete, cf.workers.tail_logs; cf.r2.list_buckets, cf.r2.list_objects, cf.r2.put/get/delete_object; cf.d1.query, cf.d1.list_databases; cf.kv.get/put/delete/list; cf.dns.list_zones, cf.dns.list_records, cf.dns.create/update/delete_record. Auth: API token or API key+email. Network: api.cloudflare.com. REST API throughout, well-documented. Workers deploy = Dangerous tier. DNS mutation = Dangerous tier. KV/R2 = Risky. 4 subtasks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:57:09.135021Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:03.104361Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:57:09.135021Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1790,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","author":"jemanuel","text":"Testing requirements: 50+ unit tests (wiremock), 10+ integration tests (ConnectorSuite/ComplianceSuite), E2E compliance script, structured JSON logging with connector_id/operation_id/duration_ms, retry telemetry with attempt/delay_ms/error. All tests deterministic, no real API calls, no timing-based flakiness.","created_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","title":"Cloudflare: V3 contract, scope, auth model, and service inventory","description":"Define the V3 contract for Cloudflare. Pin down the exact first-slice service inventory across Workers, R2, D1, KV, and DNS, the auth boundary around API tokens and account or zone scoping, OperationInfo safety and risk semantics, and explicit non-goals for the first implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:12.237393Z","closed_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:12.236986Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1845,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"V3 contract for Cloudflare:

**Archetype**: Cloud Control Plane (edge infrastructure)
**Auth model**: API Token (scoped) or Global API Key + Email. API Token recommended (least-privilege). Bearer token auth.
**Network**: api.cloudflare.com:443. TLS required.

**Operations (first slice — Workers/Pages/DNS/KV focus)**:
| Operation | SafetyTier | RiskLevel | IdempotencyClass | Capability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| cloudflare.workers.list | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.workers.read |
| cloudflare.workers.get | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.workers.read |
| cloudflare.workers.deploy | Risky | High | Strict | cloudflare.workers.write |
| cloudflare.workers.delete | Dangerous | Critical | Strict | cloudflare.workers.write |
| cloudflare.pages.list_projects | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.pages.read |
| cloudflare.pages.create_deployment | Risky | High | Strict | cloudflare.pages.write |
| cloudflare.dns.list_records | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.dns.read |
| cloudflare.dns.create_record | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.dns.update_record | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.dns.delete_record | Dangerous | High | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.kv.get | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.kv.read |
| cloudflare.kv.put | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.kv.write |
| cloudflare.kv.delete | Dangerous | High | Strict | cloudflare.kv.write |
| cloudflare.zones.list | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.zones.read |
| cloudflare.health | Safe | Low | Strict | cloudflare.zones.read |

**Safety policy**: Worker/DNS delete = Dangerous (affects live traffic). Deploy = Risky/High (replaces running code). Zone ID scoping required for zone-specific operations.

**Provisioning**: Create API token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens. Doctor: zones.list validates token.

**Non-goals (first slice)**: No R2 storage management, no D1 database, no Queues, no WAF/firewall rules, no Access/Zero Trust, no registrar management.","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:02Z"}]}
